executive_summary: Strong unit economics with LTV/CAC of 8.97x and 2.23-month payback at $299/mo subscription; subscription model validated by 6+ funded restaurant SaaS companies including Restaurant365 ($1B valuation), Toast (public), and MarketMan; pricing power moderate with 3.5x competitive spread and no free alternatives.
score_reasoning: Score 82/100 — LTV/CAC Ratio: 21/25 (LTV $4,485 / CAC $500 = 8.97x; ARPU from competitive pricing benchmark, CAC from FirstPageSage hospitality SaaS). Revenue Model Validation: 22/25 (6+ companies using subscription for restaurant tech: Restaurant365, Toast, MarketMan, Apicbase, ClearCOGS, Owner.com; model is dominant approach). Payback Period: 22/25 (2.23 months; CAC $500 / monthly margin $224.25; well under 7 months). Pricing Power: 17/25 (pricing spans 3.5x from $199-$689; Restaurant365 premium at $469-689 with 318 G2 reviews; no dominant free alternative). Total: 21+22+22+17=82.

data.model_justification: All major restaurant tech competitors (Restaurant365, MarketMan, Apicbase, ClearCOGS, Winnow, Leanpath) use subscription models. Subscription aligns with ongoing value delivery (continuous waste predictions, daily menu/purchase suggestions) and recurring usage patterns. Restaurant365 ($1B valuation, $100M ARR) and Toast (public company) validate subscription as the dominant and most successful model in restaurant SaaS.

pricing_suggestion.justification: Competitive benchmark: low=$199 (MarketMan), mid=$350, high=$689 (Restaurant365). Pain intensity is 'high' from Problem Validation, justifying mid-range pricing. $299/mo positions below premium enterprise solutions (R365 $469-689) but above basic inventory tools (MarketMan $199), reflecting AI-powered predictive value + supplier integration differentiation. Undercuts enterprise competitors to capture SMB segment.

unit_economics.churn_source: UserMotion 2024 B2B SaaS Benchmarks (4.2% average), RealGrowthMetrics 2024 (SMB 6-8% growth stage), adjusted to 5% for restaurant SMB SaaS at $200-350/mo ARPU tier (UserMotion: ARPU $100-250 = 7.1% churn, higher ARPU segments trend lower)
unit_economics.margin_source: SaaS industry standard 70-85% gross margin (Eqvista SaaS benchmarks); Tidemark 2025 Vertical SaaS Back Office ~60% (includes hardware); pure SaaS without hardware typically 75-80% (SaaSCan 2024)
unit_economics.cac_source: FirstPageSage 2025: Hospitality SaaS SMB blended CAC = $907; ClickStrike 2024: Hospitality benchmark $280-$600; using $500 as blended CAC assuming content marketing + paid search mix for SMB restaurant targeting

cac_plus_20.assessment: Even with 20% higher CAC ($600), LTV/CAC remains excellent at 7.48x and payback stays under 3 months — model is highly resilient to CAC inflation.

churn_plus_20.assessment: At 6% monthly churn, LTV drops to $3,738 but LTV/CAC at 7.48x is still excellent — model tolerates higher-than-expected SMB churn well.

price_minus_20.assessment: Even at $239/mo (near MarketMan pricing), LTV/CAC remains strong at 7.18x with sub-3-month payback — significant pricing flexibility exists.

model_precedents.segment: Restaurant back-office management (accounting, inventory, payroll) for multi-location restaurants
model_precedents.evidence: $1B valuation, $283M total funding (ICONIQ Growth, KKR, L Catterton), $100M ARR, 40,000+ restaurant locations, 12 consecutive quarters exceeding sales targets

model_precedents.segment: All-in-one restaurant technology platform (POS, operations, digital ordering, marketing)
model_precedents.evidence: Public company (NYSE: TOST), purpose-built restaurant SaaS platform, subscription services revenue growing via platform adoption and location growth

model_precedents.segment: Cloud-based inventory management for SMB restaurants
model_precedents.evidence: $199-249/mo pricing, 52 G2 reviews + 112 Capterra reviews showing strong SMB adoption, backed by venture funding

model_precedents.segment: F&B management platform for multi-outlet foodservice with demand forecasting
model_precedents.evidence: $3.2M revenue, 52 employees, 60 G2 reviews, 35 Capterra reviews, subscription tiers including Professional with forecasting

model_precedents.segment: AI-powered forecasting for restaurant operations (closest direct competitor to proposed idea)
model_precedents.evidence: $5.82M raised over 4 rounds, seed round led by Closed Loop Partners, AI forecasting for food prep and waste reduction, Toast POS integration

model_precedents.segment: Digital presence and marketing SaaS for independent restaurants
model_precedents.evidence: $200M valuation post-Series B ($33M, Redpoint Ventures), 2,000+ restaurant partners, $100M+ annual payments processed, 70% ARR growth YoY

assumptions: Churn rate of 5% monthly based on B2B SaaS SMB benchmarks (UserMotion 2024: 4.2% avg, RealGrowthMetrics: SMB 6-8% growth stage) — adjusted for restaurant SMB segment with moderate switching costs

CAC of $500 blended (FirstPageSage Hospitality SMB: $907, ClickStrike Hospitality: $280-$600) — assumes content marketing + paid search mix, lower than pure hospitality due to focused restaurant niche
Gross margin of 75% for pure SaaS without hardware (industry standard 70-85%, Tidemark Back Office vSaaS ~60% includes hardware/fintech)
Price point of $299/mo based on competitive pricing benchmark ($199-$689 range) and high pain intensity justifying mid-range positioning
LTV calculation assumes steady-state monthly ARPU without expansion revenue or annual contract discounts
No freemium tier assumed; direct paid subscription from first customer contact
